name: @metorial/penpot
description: Create, manage, and export design files and prototyping projects. Manage teams with role-based access, organize projects, and manipulate design elements including shapes, components, pages, and media assets. Search and filter shapes by type, color, font, or text content. Upload media assets, add comments for collaboration, export design tokens for code workflows, and export files in native .penpot format. Receive webhook notifications for file, comment, project, and team membership events.
